items.title: Associate Software Developer
items.description: Architected and maintained reusable React and Craft CMS boilerplates with a streamlined Git workflow. Engineered high-performance Next.js applications with optimized SSR/CSR, integrated Craft CMS APIs, and led end-to-end delivery from requirements to deployment. Accelerated implementation using Copilot and Codex within test-driven delivery workflows.

items.title: Software Developer
items.description: Built interactive React components and optimized multipage architecture for performance and server efficiency. Created structured responsive pages with Bootstrap-based styling systems, integrated PIMCORE CMS endpoints, and improved customer-journey workflows in Salesforce-based operations.

items.title: Jr. Frontend Developer (Internship)
items.description: Implemented a client shop system, developed a React SPA to improve loading performance, integrated Firebase-backed dynamic data instead of static datasets, and implemented RESTful client-server communication.

items.title: Masters in Applied Computer Science
items.description: Focused on advanced databases, software architecture, cybersecurity, and UX engineering with practical projects in modern component-based frontend systems and React.

items.title: Bachelor of Computer Application
items.description: Studied Linux OS, data structures, software testing, computer networks, SQL/PLSQL, Java, C++, and web development fundamentals.
